params.name: San Plate
params.description:
On Mar 22, 1810 AD, Alinbao was granted the title of governor of Riverlands for his service in presenting the San Plate.
Sanshipan, also known as San Plate, is a bronze vessel cast during the reign of Emperor Li of the Western Zhou Dynasty. It is also the earliest land contract in China. 357 inscriptions are engraved on the inside of the pan, recording Chinese earliest state boundary documents. Its style of calligraphy created the first cursive seal script.
